ResearchProjectDef.label: territorial marking
ResearchProjectDef.description: Stake your claim. Enables construction of a basic claim post from any available materials. Every player starts with this researched and one claim post in their inventory.

ResearchProjectDef.label: territorial beaconing
ResearchProjectDef.description: Powered sovereignty beacons that project a full jurisdiction field. Enables per-claim tick rate control, speed hooks, and complete territorial enforcement.
